query:
SELECT id, title, destinationCity, includes, excludes, noticeDetailed, hotels, meals, createdAt 
FROM tours 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT id, title, destinationCity, includes, excludes, noticeDetailed, hotels, meals, createdAt 
FROM tours 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;

rows.title: 荷比盧風車運河 12 日｜鬱金香花海 × 中世紀古城漫遊
rows.destinationCity: 荷蘭 比利時 盧森堡
rows.noticeDetailed: {"preparation":["辦理申根簽證（如需要），準備護照有效期至少6個月以上","兌換歐元或準備國際信用卡，荷蘭比利時接受刷卡支付","購買歐洲旅遊保險，涵蓋醫療和行李保障","預訂火車通票或購買點對點車票，便於三國間移動"],"culturalNotes":["尊重當地自行車文化，荷蘭自行車道眾多，行人需注意","比利時人講法語和荷蘭語，學習基本用語有助溝通","參觀教堂和博物館時著裝得體，避免穿著過於暴露","品嚐當地美食如比利時啤酒、巧克力和薯條時尊重飲食文化"],"healthSafety":["自來水安全可飲用，但建議購買瓶裝水以備不時之需","歐洲醫療水準高，建議購買旅遊醫療保險","冬季氣溫低且潮濕，準備防水外套和保暖衣物","攜帶常用藥物和處方箋，以防緊急情況"],"emergency":["緊急求助撥打112（警察、消防、救護車通用號碼）","保管好護照、機票等重要文件，複印件分開存放","遇到扒竊或搶劫立即報警並聯繫領事館","購買旅遊保險並記錄保險公司24小時緊急聯繫電話"]}
rows.hotels: [{"name":"機上","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"Van der Valk Hotel Zwolle","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"NH Collection Amsterdam Barbizon Palace 或 Crown Plaza Amsterdam City Centre 或同級","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"Hotel Le Louise Brussels MGallery by Sofitel 或 Thon Hotel Bristol Stephanie 或 Hotel Amigo 或同級","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"Hotel La Cour St. Georges 或 NH Gent Belfort 或同級","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"Mercure Hotel Trier Porta Nigra 或 Vienna House Easy Trier 或同級","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"},{"name":"Park Plaza Victoria Amsterdam 或 DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station 或同級","stars":"待確認","description":"待確認","facilities":[],"location":"待確認"}]
